title: BEM-845 route A verify
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 08:08 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
b844=load('governance/state/bem844_verify_option_a_results.json')
status_in=b844.get('status','unknown')
missing=b844.get('missing',[])
if status_in=='option_a_complete_triad_present':
    status='step6_process_protocol_next'
    next_action='read real Claude response and create agreed protocol table'
elif status_in=='option_a_blocked_dispatch_results_missing' or 'workflow_dispatch_results' in missing:
    status='step6_repair_dispatch_results_next'
    next_action='patch queue processor/result writer; dispatch result still missing'
elif status_in=='option_a_blocked_runtime_missing' or 'claude_runtime_state' in missing:
    status='step6_repair_runtime_next'
    next_action='parse dispatch result and patch Claude runtime-state writer'
else:
    status='step6_repair_real_response_next'
    next_action='patch Claude response writer/provider and retry until real response exists'
state={'bem':'BEM-845','status':status,'bem844_status':status_in,'missing':missing,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem845_route_option_a_after_verify.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem845_route_option_a_after_verify.md').write_text('# BEM-845 | Route Option A After Verify | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem845_next.md').write_text('Option A step 7: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-845 OPTION A ROUTE'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem845_route_option_a_after_verify.json','governance/reports/bem845_route_option_a_after_verify.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem845_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Option A step 6: routed after BEM-844 verification to the next concrete action')
"""
